sentences.text: Connectors also let Claude act on time and messages.
Connect your calendar and it can factor in your real schedule; connect email and it can draft or send based on what's there.

For the bakery, that means asks like: "Look at next week's calendar and draft a short 'this week at Rosewood' update for the website," or "Check my orders inbox and summarize what needs baking tomorrow."
Claude works from your real, current information instead of you feeding it in by hand.
